summary: A Go-based orchestration tool that detects, runs, and reports on schema assertions with plugin support and automated agent workflows.
concerns: frequent archiving of timed-out GLM agent sessions indicates flaky or unstable orchestration workflows
untracked files in git status suggest missing .gitignore entries
deeply nested orchestration session directories could lead to path management complexity
suggestions: investigate and stabilize the GLM agent timeout issues causing frequent session archiving
clean up git state by addressing staged and untracked files
consider consolidating or pruning archived session directories to reduce repository bloat
